name: @absolutejs/voice-tester
description: AI-driven automated tester for @absolutejs/voice services — simulates a caller end-to-end (Twilio Media Stream protocol or real Twilio outbound), drives the conversation with TTS + STT + LLM. Built for the AbsoluteJS AI Studio.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/cli.ts src/scenarios/index.ts src/discord.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --external '@absolutejs/*' --external 'discord.js' --external '@discordjs/*' --external 'prism-media' && bun x tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
